---
page-layout: article
toc: false
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
library(tidyverse)
library(posterior)
library(cmdstanr)
library(gt)
library(gtExtras)
library(scales)
library(glue)
library(googlesheets4)
library(reactable)
library(htmltools)

gs4_auth(email = Sys.getenv("GOOGLE_MAIL"))
source("../R/elo_table.R")

table_players <- fetch_table_players()
newest_date <- fetch_newest_date()
results_root <- "../results"
labels <- ranking_table_labels("en")
```

:::: {.page-header}

```{=html}
<div class="mana-pips">
  <i class="ms ms-w mana-pip-w"></i>
  <i class="ms ms-u mana-pip-u"></i>
  <i class="ms ms-b mana-pip-b"></i>
  <i class="ms ms-r mana-pip-r"></i>
  <i class="ms ms-g mana-pip-g"></i>
</div>
```

[ELO Rankings]{.subtitle}

[Updated `r newest_date`]{.date-badge}


::::

```{ojs}
//| label: cube-selector
viewof cubeFilter = Inputs.select(
  ["All", "High", "Medium", "Low", "Other"],
  {
    label: "Cube category:",
    value: "All"
  }
)
```

```{ojs}
//| label: cube-toggle
{
  const panels = document.querySelectorAll(".cube-table-panel");
  panels.forEach(el => {
    el.classList.toggle("active", el.dataset.cube === cubeFilter);
  });
}
```

::: {.cube-table-panel data-cube="All" .active}

```{r}
#| label: table-all
#| column: page

render_score_table_interactive(
  top_n = Inf,
  results_root = results_root,
  min_total_games = 18,
  table_players = table_players,
  newest_date = NULL,
  labels = labels
)
```

:::

::: {.cube-table-panel data-cube="High"}

```{r}
#| label: table-high
#| column: page

render_cube_score_table_interactive(
  cube_type = "High",
  results_root = results_root,
  min_total_games = 3,
  table_players = table_players,
  labels = labels
)
```

:::

::: {.cube-table-panel data-cube="Medium"}

```{r}
#| label: table-medium
#| column: page

render_cube_score_table_interactive(
  cube_type = "Medium",
  results_root = results_root,
  min_total_games = 3,
  table_players = table_players,
  labels = labels
)
```

:::

::: {.cube-table-panel data-cube="Low"}

```{r}
#| label: table-low
#| column: page

render_cube_score_table_interactive(
  cube_type = "Low",
  results_root = results_root,
  min_total_games = 3,
  table_players = table_players,
  labels = labels
)
```

:::

::: {.cube-table-panel data-cube="Other"}

```{r}
#| label: table-other
#| column: page

render_cube_score_table_interactive(
  cube_type = "Other",
  results_root = results_root,
  min_total_games = 3,
  table_players = table_players,
  labels = labels
)
```

:::
